reviews.name: 동동
reviews.content:
양말 좋아하는 강쥐로서 취향저격 장난감!
작을 줄 알았는데 생각보다 터그놀이하기 적당해요!
삑삑,바스락 소리도 나서 더 좋아하고
밧줄도 입으로 뜯으면서 놀아요ㅎㅎ
또한 인형부분있어서 치아 걱정없이 터그놀이 할 수 있어서 좋아요~~
터그놀이 좋아하는 친구들한테 추천~
reviews.content_en: As a pup who loves socks, this toy is exactly my taste! 🎉 I thought it would be smaller, but it's actually perfect size for tug-of-war! He loves it even more because of the squeaky and crinkly sounds, and he enjoys tugging on the rope too ㅎㅎ Plus, since there's a plush toy part, I can play tug-of-war without worrying about his teeth. Highly recommend to friends who love tug-of-war!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
물고 씹고 가지고 놀더니 지쳐서 장난감이랑 같이 잤어요❤️
원래 터그놀이 좋아해서 보자마자 좋아 할 것 같았는데!
역시나 기대를 저버리지 않았아요ㅎㅎ
삑삑과 터그의 조합 장난감이면 환장합니다!
reviews.content_en: He chewed, played with it, and then got so tired he napped with the toy ❤️ He already loves tug-of-war, so I had a feeling he'd love it right away, and he absolutely did! ㅎㅎ If it's a combo toy with squeaky sounds and tug-of-war features, he goes crazy for it!

reviews.name: 꼬미
reviews.content:
개사원이 먼저 사용해봤어요!
터그놀이를 좋아하는 강쥐인데 평소에 그냥 인형으로 하다가 제 손이 짤릴 뻔한적이 한두번이 아닌데
사람손으로 잡기도 편하고 강쥐도 보들보들한 천때문에 너무 좋아해요 튼튼해서 너무 좋은듯!
아가스러운 디자인도 최고 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: My dog tested it out first! He's a pup who loves tug-of-war, but we used to just play with regular plushies and there were times my hand almost got pinched—more than once. It's easy for humans to grip, and he absolutely loves it because of the soft fabric. It's so durable, which is amazing! The cute design is the best too ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 밧줄이라 터그놀이하기 좋아요! 이번에 바잇미에서 장난감 두개샀는데 가나디가 둘 다 너무 좋아해서 매일 갖고 놀아요 ㅋㅋ 사진보면 정말 정신없이 갖고 놀죠 ?? 뽀송이가 좋아하는 만큼 저도 정말 만족스러워요! 세일할 때 구매해서 저렴하게 잘 샀습니다. 점핑부기도 기대돼요!!
reviews.content_en: The rope makes it great for tug-of-war! I bought two toys from BITE ME this time and both Ganadi love them so much that they play with them every day ㅋㅋ As you can see in the photos, they go absolutely crazy with them! Since Ppossong loves it so much, I'm really satisfied too! I got a great deal buying during the sale. I'm looking forward to trying the Jumping Boogie next!!

reviews.name: 김나무
reviews.content:
로프 터그 장난감을 워낙 좋아해서 이것도 역시나 좋아할 것 같았는데.. 취향저격했습니다🔫
삑삑+바스락+터그 기능까지 있어서 물고 던지고 땡기고 알차게 놀 수 있어요!
양말 물고 다니니까 너무 귀여운 건 덤...!
인간 양말 훔쳐가는 장난꾸러기들에게 귀여운 양말 장난감 선물하세요🧦
reviews.content_en: I really love rope tug toys, so I figured this would be a hit too... and it totally nailed it! 🔫 With squeaky + crinkly + tug functions, he can chew, throw, and pull—so much fun packed in one toy! The bonus cuteness of him carrying around a sock toy is too much... 😄 For those mischievous pups who steal socks from their humans, gift them an adorable sock toy! 🧦

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content: 배송 진짜 빠르네요~ 강아지도 너무 좋아합니다 잘 가지고 놀아요 굿
reviews.content_en: Shipping is really fast~ My dog loves it too and plays with it well. Great!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
바잇미 제품은 무조건 고고
가격이살짝 아쉽지만 퀄리티며 색상모두 만족하는곳이구요
울댕댕이 인형은 쭉 바잇미에서 ♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: BITE ME products are always a go 💯 The price is a bit steep, but I'm satisfied with the quality and colors. I always get my pup's plushies from BITE ME ♡♡♡

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
터그놀이랑 삑삑이 같이 있어서
놀아주기 너무 좋네요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Having both tug-of-war and squeaky features makes playtime so much fun! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content_en: He plays with it well~ I bought it as a Chuseok gift~~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content_en: He's really good at grabbing and shaking it ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 강아지의 최애 장난감이 되었어요! 바스락 소리랑 삑삑이도 있어서 완전 좋아요! 재구매의향 있습니당
reviews.content_en: It became my dog's favorite toy! The crinkly sound and squeaky feature are amazing! Definitely will repurchase!

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content_en: He plays with it so so well!
